data.name: Lizard
data.about: Lizards are a widespread group of squamate reptiles, with over 6,000 species, ranging across all continents except Antarctica

data.name: Lions
data.about: Lions are large wild cats that live mainly in Africa. They are known for their strength and social behavior, living in groups called prides.

data.name: Panda
data.about: Pandas are large black-and-white bears that live in the forests of China. They mainly eat bamboo and are famous for their.

data.name: Dog
data.about: Dogs are domesticated animals that have lived with humans for thousands of years. They are known for their loyalty, intelligence.

data.name: Puppy
data.about: A puppy is a young dog that is usually playful and full of energy. Puppies learn quickly and need care, training.
